name: Rahim Elhaj
title: Fullstack Developer
subject: Application for Fullstack Developer
body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am a recently graduated Fullstack Developer from Teknikhögskolan with practical experience building and deploying modern web applications using Java, Spring Boot, React, TypeScript, SQL, Docker, and cloud platforms.

During my internship and subsequent role as a System Developer at FBK Balkan, I worked within an agile team to build a production-ready sports management and youth portal platform. I was responsible for designing and implementing REST APIs, developing backend services with Spring Boot, and managing relational databases. Notably, I helped build a secure, scalable system featuring role-based access control, GDPR-compliant data handling, third-party API integrations, and automated workflows used by real users.

In addition to my professional experience, I have built several full-stack projects that showcase my ability to design complete end-to-end solutions. These include an AI-powered Chrome extension using LLMs to refine text, an automated job-search tool, and a salon booking application built with Spring Boot.

My technical skills include:
• Java & Spring Boot
• React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML & CSS
• PostgreSQL, SQLite & SQL
• REST API Development & System Integration
• Spring Security & Authentication Systems
• Git, Agile/Scrum, CI/CD & Docker

I am passionate about software development and motivated by continuous learning and problem-solving. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my technical background and practical experience can contribute to your team.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.

Kind regards,
Abdelrahim Elhaj
Fullstack Developer
